headline: International Business Machines (IBM) Unveils Industry’s First Quantum-Centric Supercomputing Architecture
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is one of the best get-rich-quick stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 12, IBM unveiled the industry’s first quantum-centric supercomputing reference architecture, providing a blueprint for integrating quantum processors/QPUs with traditional CPUs and GPUs. This new architecture creates a unified environment across on-premises systems and the cloud, […]
